observations.text: Social circle states Rosa is 57 years old. Interview confirms: 'My mom, Rosa, is 57' (Q05). Consistent.
Social circle describes daily phone calls. Interview confirms: 'I talk to her on the phone almost every day' (Q05). Consistent.

Social circle describes Rosa as formerly a daycare teaching assistant, now part-time babysitter/housekeeper. Interview confirms: worked at daycare center as teaching assistant for 12 years (Q103), moved to part-time babysitting and housekeeping after it closed (Q104). Consistent.
Social circle says Rosa lives in Sacramento, CA. Interview confirms parents still live in Sacramento area, same house Alicia grew up in (Q05, Q97). Consistent.

Social circle describes Rosa's pivotal career advice: 'Mija, you can always make more money, but you can't get back the years you spend doing something you don't love.' Interview confirms this exact quote in Q02 follow-up. Consistent.

Social circle states Rosa has 'some college (early childhood education, incomplete degree, Colombia).' Interview confirms: 'She did a couple years of college in Colombia... studied early childhood education but didn't finish the degree' (Q101). Consistent.
Social circle describes Rosa shipping food via bus. Interview confirms: 'my mom will sometimes ship me food... send a cooler bag on the bus with someone heading to Chico' (Q05 follow-up). Consistent.
Social circle describes Rosa's reluctance to schedule medical checkups. Interview confirms: 'I've had to practically drag her to her annual physical' (Q36). Consistent.
Social circle describes Colombian cooking as shared activity (arepas, empanadas, bandeja paisa). Profile's food_and_dining lists these exact dishes as part of Alicia's cooking repertoire. Consistent.

Social circle describes attending Spanish-language Mass together when Alicia visits. Profile's others_misc.cultural_and_linguistic notes attendance at Spanish-language Mass at St. John the Baptist. Consistent.
Social circle states visits twice a month. Profile's social_and_relationships lists 'Visits parents in Sacramento twice monthly.' Consistent.

Social circle lists Sunday FaceTime calls with abuela in Colombia as shared activity. Profile's others_misc.cultural_and_linguistic captures 'FaceTimes grandmother in Colombia every Sunday.' Consistent.

Social circle states Diego is 25 years old, lives in LA, does music production. Interview confirms: 'Diego -- he's 25 now, lives in LA... he's in the music scene in LA, doing production work' (Q05, Q01 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle describes Diego driving up from LA three weekends during the divorce. Interview confirms: 'He drove up from LA like three different weekends right after it happened' (Q01 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle says they text every day and exchange midnight memes. Interview confirms: 'We text every day and call a few times a week... we send each other terrible memes at like midnight' (Q05). Consistent.

Social circle references Diego's BLM involvement and incorporating social justice into music. Interview confirms: 'He's been very plugged in... He's also been incorporating themes of social justice into his music production work' (Q30). Consistent.
Social circle mentions Diego's recent breakup. Interview confirms: 'he went through a rough patch last year when a relationship ended' (Q46). Consistent.

Social circle states Diego crashes on Alicia's couch every couple months. Interview confirms: 'My brother Diego crashes on my couch maybe once every couple months when he drives up from LA' (Q13). Consistent.

Social circle describes bonding over creative projects (music demos, generative art). Profile's social_and_relationships captures 'Daily texts with brother Diego; calls a few times per week.' Creative bonding is implicit but not detailed.
Social circle mentions planning the Colombia trip together. Profile's travel preferences confirm 'Saving $2,000-$2,500 for a return trip to visit grandmother' (Q62). Consistent.

Social circle describes discussing dad's retirement and knee problems. Profile's others_misc.life_events_and_transitions captures 'Father approaching retirement age with physical health concerns.' Consistent.

Social circle states Priya is a data engineer at a startup in Chico; they met at a hackathon three years ago. Interview confirms: 'My closest friend is Priya -- she's a data engineer at a startup in Chico. We met at a hackathon three years ago' (Q07). Consistent.

Social circle describes Priya showing up with soup during a five-day depressive episode. Interview confirms: 'Priya noticed I'd gone dark and showed up at my door with soup and just sat with me' (Q44). Consistent.

Social circle states Priya is Indian American and they bond over immigrant family expectations in tech. Interview confirms: 'She's Indian American and we bond over the whole navigating immigrant family expectations while building a tech career thing' (Q07). Consistent.

Social circle lists board game nights every other Friday at Priya's place with partner James, Marcus, and rotating others. Interview confirms: 'board game nights at her place, usually every other Friday. There's a whole group of us -- Priya, her partner James, my friend Marcus who teaches at Chico State' (Q07). Consistent.

Social circle states Priya organized a civil rights fundraiser. Interview confirms: 'My friend Priya has been really engaged too -- she organized a fundraiser through her workplace for a local civil rights organization' (Q30). Consistent.
Social circle mentions Priya sees a therapist and recommends it to Alicia. Interview confirms: 'Priya sees one and swears by it' (Q45). Consistent.
Social circle states Priya has stayed over after late game nights. Interview confirms: 'Priya has stayed over after late game nights a couple times' (Q13). Consistent.

Social circle describes board game nights with strategy games (Wingspan, Terraforming Mars, Catan). Profile's social_and_relationships lists 'Board game nights every other Friday at friend Priya's place (Wingspan, Terraforming Mars, Catan, Codenames).' Consistent.
Social circle lists communication frequency as 3-4x/week. Profile describes Priya as 'closest friend' with regular contact. Consistent.
Social circle describes Priya as sounding board for UC Davis collaboration stress. Profile's work_and_career section notes 'Active UC Davis collaboration.' Consistent context.

per_person_verification.name: Tom Bridwell
per_person_verification.relationship: hiking buddy and older mentor figure

observations.text: Social circle states Tom is retired, about 65, and knows every trail in Butte County. Interview confirms: 'My main hiking buddy is a guy named Tom -- he's retired, maybe 65, and he knows every trail in Butte County. He's like a trail encyclopedia' (Q07). Consistent.

Social circle describes Alicia joining the Chico Outdoor Club post-divorce and Tom approaching her on her first hike about wildflowers. Interview confirms: 'Tom immediately started chatting me up about the wildflowers we were seeing, and by the end of the hike I felt like I'd known him forever' (Q07 follow-up). Consistent.
Social circle states they hike together most Saturdays. Interview confirms: 'We hike together most Saturdays' (Q07). Consistent.

Social circle describes Tom as 'older and white' who asks genuine questions about race. Interview confirms: 'My hiking buddy Tom, who's older and white, has been more on the aware but listening end. He's asked me questions in a genuine way' (Q30). Consistent.

Social circle states years_known as 2, saying Alicia joined the club after her divorce. Interview states divorce was ~2 years ago and she joined the club 'Right after the divorce' (Q07 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle infers Tom's education and prior career without direct interview evidence, noting 'inferred from conversational sophistication.' This is unsourced but transparently labeled as inference.

Social circle describes Saturday hiking in Butte County, Ishi Wilderness, and Upper Bidwell Park. Profile's nature_and_outdoors lists 'Regular hiker in Ishi Wilderness and Butte County trails' and 'Hiking partner Tom (retired, ~65).' Consistent.
Social circle mentions shared interest in Alicia's Raspberry Pi weather station. Profile's technology section lists 'Custom-built AQI monitoring weather station.' Consistent.
Social circle mentions Tom as a hiking decompression ritual. Profile's nature_and_outdoors describes 'Nature is central to well-being, stress management.' Consistent.

Social circle describes Kai as a research scientist with complementary systems engineering skills. Interview confirms: 'Kai and I collaborate well -- we have complementary skills, and he's good at the stuff I'm weaker at, like systems engineering' (Q77). Consistent.

Social circle describes the lab as having 5 people total under Dr. Patel. Interview confirms: 'There are five of us total -- Dr. Patel leads the lab, there's me, another research scientist named Kai, and two grad students' (Q16 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle describes the lab reading group on bias in AI co-founded after the George Floyd conversation. Interview confirms: 'After that, we started a small reading group at the lab where we read articles about bias in AI and equity in tech. It's still going' (Q26 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle states Kai was 'visibly affected' by Alicia's account of navigating tech as a woman of color. Interview confirms: 'Kai, my colleague who's white, was visibly affected -- he said he'd never thought about how his experience in the same field was just fundamentally different from mine' (Q26 follow-up). Consistent.
Social circle describes collaborative, non-competitive lab culture. Interview confirms: 'It's collaborative in a really healthy way. Nobody's competitive about it' (Q16 follow-up). Consistent.

Social circle states years_known as 5, since Alicia has been at the lab for 5 years. Interview confirms: 'I've been at the lab for about five years now, since right after graduation' (Q76). Consistent.
Social circle infers Kai's age (31) and education (Master's or PhD in CS). Neither is stated in the interview. Transparently labeled as inferred.
Social circle describes daily workday collaboration, weekly lab meetings. Profile's work_and_career section lists '5 years at current lab under Dr. Patel; team of 5.' Consistent.

Social circle mentions the UC Davis multilingual collaboration as a recent text topic. Profile's work_and_career lists 'Active UC Davis collaboration on multilingual generative language models.' Consistent.
Social circle mentions the lab reading group on bias in AI. Profile's community_and_civic lists 'Participated in lab reading group on bias in AI and equity in tech.' Consistent.

structural_checks_detail.family_members: Rosa Gonzalez (mother), Diego Gonzalez (younger brother) -- 2 family members providing both parental and sibling coverage
structural_checks_detail.non_work_friends: Priya Kapoor (best friend, met at hackathon), Tom Bridwell (hiking buddy, met through Outdoor Club) -- 2 non-work friends from different contexts
structural_checks_detail.work_colleagues: Kai Lindstrom (fellow research scientist at same lab) -- 1 work colleague
structural_checks_detail.diversity_assessment: Circle includes: age range 25-65; male and female; Colombian American, Indian American, white/Scandinavian-surnamed; family, peer, and intergenerational relationships; work and non-work contexts; urban (LA) and local (Chico) and Sacramento connections. Adequate diversity.
structural_checks_detail.evidence_citations: All 5 social circle members have explicit evidence_from_interview fields with specific Q## citations. Rosa: Q05, Q01, Q02, Q36, Q45. Diego: Q01, Q05, Q30, Q46. Priya: Q07, Q44, Q45, Q30, Q13, Q38. Tom: Q07, Q30. Kai: Q16, Q77, Q26.

gaps_found.gap: Education listed as 'Bachelor's degree (inferred from age and professional trajectory)' but no interview evidence supports this. Diego's educational background is never discussed.
Age listed as 30 and education inferred as 'Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science.' Neither is stated in the interview. Age is a reasonable inference from peer relationship context.
Education and prior career are entirely inferred. The social circle transparently labels these as inferences. Tom's background is never discussed beyond 'retired, maybe 65.'
Age (31) and education (Master's or PhD) are inferred. Kai's specific age and degree are never stated in the interview.

Social circle describes bonding over 'creative projects -- sharing music demos and generative art experiments' as shared activities. This creative exchange is confirmed in the interview (Q01 follow-up: 'we bond over creative stuff a lot') but the specific detail of sharing demos and art experiments is an extrapolation.

Social circle includes 'Family FaceTime calls with abuela in Colombia on Sundays' as a shared activity. Interview confirms Sunday FaceTime with abuela (Q06) and Rosa's involvement in family communication, but does not explicitly state they do the call together. Reasonable inference given family dynamics.

final_status: The Step 3 social circle for Alicia Gonzalez passes verification. All five members are well-grounded in interview evidence with specific Q## citations. Zero inconsistencies were found between the social circle data and either the interview transcript or extracted profile. The circle meets all structural requirements: 2 family members (mother, brother), 2 non-work friends (Priya, Tom), and 1 work colleague (Kai), with adequate diversity across age, gender, ethnicity, relationship type, and context. All inferred demographic details (ages, education levels for Diego, Priya, Tom, Kai) are transparently labeled as inferences in the social circle document. The recent_text_topics for each member are well-sourced from interview evidence and consistent with the extracted profile's preference categories. No corrections needed.
